name: Meta Ads
description: Manage Facebook and Instagram Ads (Meta Ads) through Pipeboard's hosted MCP server. 93 tools spanning ad accounts, campaigns, ad sets, ads, creatives, audiences, product catalogs, lead-gen forms, pixels, Instagram/Facebook organic content and performance insights. WORKFLOW: (1) call get_ad_accounts first to obtain your act_XXXXXXXXX account ID. (2) Use get_campaigns, get_adsets and get_ads to inspect structure. (3) Use get_insights for reporting (impressions, clicks, spend, ROAS, conversions). WARNING: create_*, update_*, delete_* and duplicate_* tools act on LIVE Meta ad accounts. They publish real ads and spend real budget. Always confirm with the user before creating or activating anything. Tools labelled PREMIUM require a paid Pipeboard plan and fail on the free tier. Pipeboard is an independent third-party service; your Meta OAuth connection and ad data are processed on Pipeboard's servers.

tools.name: get_ad_accounts
tools.description: List all ad accounts accessible by the connected Meta user. Start here to get your act_XXXXXXXXX account ID.

tools.name: get_account_info
tools.description: Detailed info about a specific ad account (currency, balance, spend, business).

tools.name: get_account_pages
tools.description: List Facebook pages associated with an ad account.

tools.name: search_pages_by_name
tools.description: Search Facebook pages by name within an ad account.

tools.name: get_pixels
tools.description: List Meta/Facebook pixels for an ad account (ID, name, last fired time, status).

tools.name: get_account_activities
tools.description: Read the Meta Ads activity log: who changed what, when, from which source (UI, API, automated rule).

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search across ad accounts, campaigns, ads, pages and businesses for matching record IDs.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a record previously returned by the search tool in the same session.

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Report a bug, request a feature or ask a question about the Meta Ads MCP tools.

tools.name: get_campaigns
tools.description: List campaigns for an ad account, with optional status filtering.

tools.name: get_campaign_details
tools.description: Detailed info about a specific campaign by campaign_id.

tools.name: create_campaign
tools.description: Create a new Facebook/Instagram ad campaign with an ODAX objective (OUTCOME_LEADS, OUTCOME_SALES, ...). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_campaign
tools.description: Update an existing campaign (name, status, budget). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: duplicate_campaign
tools.description: Duplicate a campaign with all its ad sets and ads (useful for experiments).

tools.name: create_budget_schedule
tools.description: Schedule budget increases for anticipated high-demand periods on a campaign.

tools.name: get_adsets
tools.description: List ad sets for an account, optionally filtered by campaign.

tools.name: get_adset_details
tools.description: Detailed info about a specific ad set by adset_id.

tools.name: create_adset
tools.description: Create a new ad set (targeting, budget, schedule, optimization). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_adset
tools.description: Update an ad set (budgets, frequency caps, status, targeting). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: duplicate_adset
tools.description: Duplicate an ad set with its ads into a target campaign.

tools.name: get_ads
tools.description: List ads for an account, with optional filtering.

tools.name: get_ad_details
tools.description: Detailed info about a specific ad by ad_id.

tools.name: create_ad
tools.description: Create a new ad from an existing creative in an ad set. Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_ad
tools.description: Update an ad (name, status, bid amount). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: duplicate_ad
tools.description: Duplicate an ad into a target ad set.

tools.name: get_ad_previews
tools.description: Get a rendered preview (iframe HTML) of an ad or creative for a given placement.

tools.name: get_ad_image
tools.description: Get, download and visualize a Meta ad image for a given ad.

tools.name: get_ad_video
tools.description: Get video ads from an account with video source URLs, sorted by spend.

tools.name: get_ad_creatives
tools.description: Get the creative(s) attached to a specific ad (requires ad_id).

tools.name: get_creative_details
tools.description: Detailed info about a specific ad creative by creative_id.

tools.name: create_ad_creative
tools.description: Create an ad creative from an uploaded image hash, video ID or existing post (5 creative modes). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_ad_creative
tools.description: Update a creative's name or optimization settings (Meta rejects content-field edits).

tools.name: duplicate_creative
tools.description: Duplicate an ad creative.

tools.name: delete_ad_creative
tools.description: Permanently delete an ad creative (not allowed while used by an active ad).

tools.name: create_existing_post_ad_creative
tools.description: Create an ad creative from an existing Instagram or Facebook page post.

tools.name: create_carousel_ad_creative
tools.description: PREMIUM (paid Pipeboard plan): create a carousel ad creative with 2 to 10 cards.

tools.name: upload_ad_image
tools.description: Upload an image (public URL or base64) for use in ad creatives.

tools.name: upload_ad_video
tools.description: Upload a video to an ad account by URL (Meta fetches it directly).

tools.name: bulk_upload_ad_images
tools.description: Upload up to 50 images concurrently; returns image hashes for create_ad_creative.

tools.name: bulk_upload_ad_videos
tools.description: Upload up to 50 videos concurrently; returns video IDs for create_ad_creative.

tools.name: delete_ad_image
tools.description: Permanently delete an ad image from the account image library by image hash.

tools.name: compute_image_crops
tools.description: Compute image_crops coordinates for a source image, ready for create_ad_creative.

tools.name: get_insights
tools.description: Performance insights (impressions, clicks, spend, conversions, ROAS) for a campaign, ad set, ad or account.

tools.name: bulk_get_insights
tools.description: PREMIUM (paid Pipeboard plan): fetch performance insights for multiple ad accounts in parallel.

tools.name: create_meta_ads_email_report
tools.description: Schedule recurring AI-powered email reports analyzing Meta Ads performance.

tools.name: list_meta_ads_email_reports
tools.description: List email-report schedules for an ad account.

tools.name: update_meta_ads_email_report
tools.description: Update an email-report schedule (cadence, timing, recipients, goals).

tools.name: delete_meta_ads_email_report
tools.description: Delete (cancel) an email-report schedule.

tools.name: bulk_update_ads
tools.description: PREMIUM (paid Pipeboard plan): update multiple ads in one call (explicit IDs or filter-based).

tools.name: bulk_update_campaigns
tools.description: PREMIUM (paid Pipeboard plan): update multiple campaigns in one call.

tools.name: bulk_update_adsets
tools.description: PREMIUM (paid Pipeboard plan): update multiple ad sets in one call.

tools.name: bulk_create_ads
tools.description: Create multiple ads in one batch request (Meta Batch API). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: bulk_create_ad_creatives
tools.description: Create multiple ad creatives in one batch request (Meta Batch API).

tools.name: bulk_get_ad_creatives
tools.description: PREMIUM (paid Pipeboard plan): fetch creative details for multiple ads at once.

tools.name: search_interests
tools.description: Search interest-targeting options by keyword.

tools.name: bulk_search_interests
tools.description: Search interest-targeting options across multiple keywords in one call.

tools.name: get_interest_suggestions
tools.description: Get interest suggestions based on a list of existing interests.

tools.name: search_behaviors
tools.description: List all available behavior-targeting options.

tools.name: search_demographics
tools.description: List demographic-targeting options by class.

tools.name: search_geo_locations
tools.description: Search geographic-targeting locations by name.

tools.name: estimate_audience_size
tools.description: Estimate audience size for a targeting spec via Meta's delivery_estimate API.

tools.name: get_custom_audiences
tools.description: List custom audiences for an ad account (ID, name, subtype, size, delivery status).

tools.name: get_saved_audiences
tools.description: List saved audiences (interest/demographic/geo targeting templates).

tools.name: create_custom_audience
tools.description: Create a custom audience (customer list, website visitors, app users, engagement).

tools.name: update_custom_audience
tools.description: Update a custom audience's metadata (name, description, retention days).

tools.name: delete_custom_audience
tools.description: Permanently delete a custom audience.

tools.name: create_lookalike_audience
tools.description: Create a lookalike audience from a custom audience (seed needs 100+ members).

tools.name: add_users_to_audience
tools.description: Upload a customer list (raw PII, normalized and hashed server-side) to a custom audience.

tools.name: remove_users_from_audience
tools.description: Remove users from a custom audience (raw PII, normalized and hashed server-side).

tools.name: list_value_rule_sets
tools.description: List Value Rule Sets for an ad account (replacement for deprecated bid_adjustments).

tools.name: create_value_rule_set
tools.description: Create a Value Rule Set on an ad account.

tools.name: update_value_rule_set
tools.description: Update an existing Value Rule Set (rename or modify its rules).

tools.name: delete_value_rule_set
tools.description: Permanently delete a Value Rule Set (detach it from ad sets first).

tools.name: get_instagram_accounts
tools.description: List Instagram business accounts linked to an ad account.

tools.name: get_instagram_posts
tools.description: List recent Instagram posts (images, videos, reels, carousels) for connected IG business accounts.

tools.name: get_instagram_account_insights
tools.description: Organic Instagram insights: follower growth, reach, profile views, website clicks.

tools.name: resolve_instagram_media
tools.description: Resolve an Instagram URL or shortcode to a media ID usable in ad creatives.

tools.name: get_facebook_posts
tools.description: Get recent Facebook Page posts with engagement metrics (shares, reactions, comments).

tools.name: get_facebook_page_insights
tools.description: Facebook Page-level insights: page views and post engagements.

tools.name: check_post_boost_eligibility
tools.description: Bulk-check whether Instagram media or Facebook posts are eligible for boosting.

tools.name: manage_partnership_ad_permission
tools.description: Set up, approve, reject, revoke or cancel a Page-level branded-content partnership.

tools.name: resolve_branded_content_creator
tools.description: Resolve an Instagram creator's user ID from their username for partnership ads.

tools.name: create_lead_gen_form
tools.description: Create a lead-generation (instant) form on a Facebook Page.

tools.name: get_lead_gen_forms
tools.description: List lead-generation (instant) forms for a Facebook Page.

tools.name: update_lead_gen_form_status
tools.description: Archive or reactivate a lead-generation form on a Facebook Page.

tools.name: publish_lead_gen_draft_form
tools.description: Publish a draft lead-generation form on a Facebook Page.

tools.name: list_catalogs
tools.description: List product catalogs associated with an ad account.

tools.name: create_catalog
tools.description: Create a new product catalog for a business linked to an ad account.

tools.name: list_product_sets
tools.description: List product sets within a product catalog.

tools.name: create_product_set
tools.description: Create a product set within a catalog (used for Advantage+ Catalog Ads).

tools.name: add_catalog_product
tools.description: Add a product item to a product catalog.

tools.name: update_catalog_product
tools.description: Update an existing product item in a catalog (only provided fields change).

tools.name: upload_conversion_events
tools.description: Upload offline or server-side conversion events via the Conversions API (CAPI).

bridge.auth_hint: Personal API token from pipeboard.co/api-tokens. Create a free Pipeboard account, connect your Meta Ads account via OAuth, then generate a token. The token carries your connected ad accounts.

credentials_required.label: Pipeboard API Token
credentials_required.hint: Personal API token from pipeboard.co/api-tokens. Create a free Pipeboard account and connect your Meta Ads account via OAuth first.

author: freddy-schuetz
